命悬一线之间，
又被天雷劈中，
倒霉至此，

反而莫名奇妙的打通了五条灵脉，变成可以修灵的灵士，
至此才知道，
武道之上，
原来还有两个更为玄妙的修行之道——灵道、魂道！
于是三道齐修，
踏上波诡云谲的修仙之途！

digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4033,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":277974,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5428},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1742774932,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7264072804881187636","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常棒的一本书，情节设定非常新颖，人物性格比较合理，主角从一个小人物一路顺风顺水拿金手指，有一些夸张的是大武师与炼气期都能力太高，至今为止呢还是在练气期，但是他这里设定就是在练气期就很厉害！情节反转很多，世界观很大，基本有练武，灵士，魂师，还有除妖师，总之，基本练气期就有点无所不能的。不过这个设定很好。女主没有可以看，一定快看看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691298803,"group_id":"7135985031230524457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7zoTNICnbu1nQGlEbbObFSF6USola6YxeYUVS7GuJpq","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776441648&x-signature=pryGg%2FwOTZFgFjdQkvI5l25lP5w%3D","user_id":"1574150826636855","user_name":"爱吃鲽鱼头的杨天二"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1574150826636855","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1642056969,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7135985031230524457","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统、无后宫、传统仙侠、凡人流】}武道小子，无意间，被毒蛇狠狠咬了一口。

于是三道齐修，
